Will ignore 35% of the target’s DEF, as well as [Shield] and [Strengthen] buffs. Level 2: Damage +10% Level 3: Damage +10% Level 4: Cooldown -1

skills.name: Everything Is Permitted [P]
skills.description: Whenever an enemy’s HP drops below 25% after receiving damage from any Assassin, they receive additional bonus damage proportional to this Champion’s ATK. This bonus damage will ignore 100% of the target’s DEF and cannot be critical.

skills.name: Full Synchronization [P]
skills.description: Places a [Perfect Veil] buff on this Champion for 2 turns at the start of each Round. Whenever this Champion is about to receive damage that would exceed 50% of their MAX HP, has a 35% chance of decreasing the damage received to 0 instead. Whenever this Champion is attacked, also has a 35% chance of counterattacking.

skills.name: Song of Steel
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Places an extra hit if the target is under a [Deathbrand] debuff. Decreases the target’s HP and DEF by 10% (stacks up to 30%). This effect does not work against Bosses. Level 2: Damage +20%

skills.name: White-Hot Rage
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Before attacking, places a [Block Passive Skills] debuff for 1 turn. Will ignore 50% of the target’s DEF, as well as [Block Damage] and [Unkillable] buffs. If the initial target is killed, will repeat the attack against all enemies and ignore 25% of each target’s DEF. Will also decrease the cooldown of the Arctic Howl skill by 2 turns if the initial target is killed while under a [Deathbrand] debuff. Level 2: Damage +20% Level 3: Cooldown -1

skills.name: Arcitc Howl
skills.description: Places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff and a 50% [Increase ACC] buff on all allies for 3 turns. Places a [Deathbrand] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. Then grants an Extra Turn. Level 2: Ignore RES +20% Level 3: Cooldown -1

skills.name: Metamorph
skills.description: Transforms this Champion into their Alternate Form. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Will Of The Tundra [P]
skills.description: [Passive Effect] Enemies under a [Deathbrand] debuff receive 20% more damage and inflict 20% less damage. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate. This skill will not activate on duplicate copies of this Champion, if this particular Champion is dead. This Champion is immune to [Freeze], [Stun], and [Provoke] debuffs. [Active Effect] Whenever this Champion is killed, revives them with 50% HP, 100% Turn Meter, and places a [Block Damage] buff on them for 1 turn.

skills.name: Shadestrike
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Has a 50% chance of placing an [Enfeeble] debuff for 2 turns. If the target is a Boss, places a 25% [Weaken] debuff for 2 turns instead. This debuff cannot be resisted if Solanar the Gleaming is on the same team. Level 2: Damage +10% Level 3: Buff/Debuff Chance +10% Level 4: Buff/Debuff Chance +15%

skills.name: Umbral Purge
skills.description: Has a 75% chance of removing all buffs from all enemies. This effect cannot be resisted if Solanar the Gleaming is on the same team. Then has a 75% chance of placing a 60% [Decrease DEF] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. This debuff cannot be resisted if Solanar the Gleaming is on the same team. If Solanar the Gleaming is on the same team, also places a 50% [Increase ATK] buff on all allies for 2 turns. Level 2: Buff/Debuff Chance +10% Level 3: Buff/Debuff Chance +15% Level 4: Cooldown -1 Level 5: Cooldown -1

skills.name: Moonbloom's Blessing
skills.description: Revives all dead allies with 50% HP and 50% Turn Meter. If Solanar the Gleaming is on the same team and is dead, revives them with 100% Turn Meter instead. Places a [Shield] buff on all allies equal to 30% of this Champion’s MAX HP for 2 turns. Level 2: Cooldown -1 Level 3: Cooldown -1

skills.name: Scholar Of Shadows [P]
skills.description: All Turn Meter fill effects used by enemies are 30% less effective. If Solanar the Gleaming is on the same team, fills this Champion’s Turn Meter by 30% of the enemy’s Turn Meter fill effect. If there are multiple Champions on the team with this skill, only one will activate. This skill will not activate on duplicate copies of this Champion, if this particular Champion is dead. Only counts Turn Meter fill effects from skills.

skills.name: Solar Surge
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. This attack is always critical if Noluda the Gloaming is on the same team. Has a 60% chance of placing a [Fatigue] debuff on all enemies for 1 turn. [Passive Effect] Has an 80% chance to counterattack with this skill whenever an enemy gets an Extra Turn or has an Instant Turn effect activated. Has a 15% chance to counterattack with this skill whenever an enemy has their Turn Meter increased. Level 2: Damage +10% Level 3: Buff/Debuff Chance +10% Level 4: Damage +10% Level 5: Buff/Debuff Chance +10%

skills.name: Blazing Force
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. This attack is always critical if Noluda the Gloaming is on the same team. Will ignore 10% of the target’s DEF for each buff on this Champion. This Champion is immune to all debuffs while this skill is not on cooldown. Whenever an enemy attempts to place a debuff on this Champion while this skill is not on cooldown, this Champion gains a random buff instead. Level 2: Damage +10% Level 3: Damage +10% Level 4: Cooldown -1

skills.name: Unfettered Radiance
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Before attacking, steals all buffs and 100% Turn Meter from the target if they are not under a [Stone Skin] buff. This effect cannot be resisted. This attack is always critical if Noluda the Gloaming is on the same team. Will ignore [Stone Skin] buffs. This Champion receives 75% less damage on enemy Extra Turns or Instant Turns while this skill is not on cooldown. While this skill is on cooldown, reduces the cooldown by 1 whenever an enemy receives an Extra Turn, has an Instant Turn effect activated on them, or has their Turn Meter increased. Occurs once per turn. Level 2: Damage +10% Level 3: Damage +10% Level 4: Damage +20%

skills.name: Scholar Of Sun [P]
skills.description: Whenever an enemy receives healing, has a 100% chance to reduce the amount of healing received to zero. This Champion will receive that healing instead. If Noluda the Gloaming is on the same team, enemies will receive damage equal to the amount of healing instead. Once per Round, if this Champion is dead, revives this Champion with 100% HP and 100% Turn Meter when their last living ally is killed. Then places a [Magma Shield] buff on this Champion for 2 turns. The value of the [Magma Shield] is equal to 300% of this Champion’s MAX HP. If Noluda the Gloaming is on the same team, this buff is protected.

skills.name: Song of Steel
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy 2 times. Will repeat the attack against the enemy with the highest Turn Meter if the initial target is under a [Leech] debuff. Level 2: Damage +20%

skills.name: White-Hot Rage
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Places a [Stun] debuff for 1 turn, and decreases the Turn Meters of all enemies by 50%. These effects cannot be resisted by targets whose ATK is lower than this Champion’s. Level 2: Damage +20% Level 3: Cooldown -1

skills.name: Arctic Howl
skills.description: Attacks all enemies. Before attacking, removes all buffs from enemies. This effect cannot be resisted by targets whose ATK is lower than this Champion’s. Places a [Leech] debuff and a 50% [Decrease ATK] debuff on all enemies for 2 turns. These debuffs cannot be resisted by targets whose ATK is lower than this Champion’s. Level 2: Damage +20% Level 3: Cooldown -1

skills.name: Metamorph
skills.description: Transforms this Champion into their Alternate Form whenever this Champion is revived by a skill, effect, or [Revive On Death] buff. Then grants an Extra Turn.

skills.name: Will Of The Tundra [P]
skills.description: Whenever an enemy has their Turn Meter filled, this Champion inflicts pure damage on that enemy equal to 3% of their MAX HP for every 10% Turn Meter filled. Will inflict 6% of their MAX HP as pure damage instead, if the enemy is under a [Leech] debuff. This damage cannot be critical and will ignore [Stone Skin], [Ally Protection], [Shield], [Strengthen], and [Fervor] buffs, [Bone Armor] stacks, and any damage modifying skills or effects. If the enemy is a Boss, the damage cannot exceed 50,000 per hit. Whenever an enemy has their Turn Meter filled, also destroys their SPD by 3 for every 10% Turn Meter filled (stacks up to 100). Will destroy 6 SPD for every 10% Turn Meter filled instead, if the enemy is under a [Leech] debuff. This effect does not work against bosses. Revives this Champion with 100% HP every 2 turns if at least one ally is alive. Once per Round, instantly revives this Champion with 100% HP if all allies are dead.

skills.name: Triumphant Blow

skills.name: Gorgoa's Bane
skills.description: Attacks 1 enemy. Will ignore 50% of the target’s DEF if the target is under a [HP Burn] debuff. The damage inflicted by this skill increases by 10% for every turn remaining on any debuffs on this Champion and the target (stacks up to 200%). If the damage inflicted by this skill is less than 50% of the target’s MAX HP, steals all buffs from the target and places a [Stun] debuff on them for 2 turns. These effects cannot be resisted if the target is under a [HP Burn] debuff. Level 2: Damage +10% Level 3: Damage +10% Level 4: Cooldown -1

skills.name: Victor's Bounty

Level 2: Shield +10% Level 3: Shield +10% Level 4: Cooldown -1

skills.name: Master Of Games [P]
skills.description: This Champion is immune to [Stun], [HP Burn], and [Petrification] debuffs. Whenever an enemy attacks this Champion, has a 100% chance of placing a [HP Burn] debuff on that enemy for 2 turns. The chance decreases to 50% if this Champion is under a [Decrease DEF] debuff. Occurs once per enemy skill. Whenever an enemy attacks this Champion, also has a 50% chance of placing a [Petrification] debuff on that enemy for 1 turn. The chance decreases to 25% if this Champion is under a [Decrease DEF] debuff. Occurs once per enemy skill.

Lv. 2 Damage +20% Lv. 3 Buff/Debuff Chance +10% Lv. 4 Buff/Debuff Chance +15%

The second hit applies a [Debuff Spread] effect, taking all [Poison] debuffs and the [Poison Sensitivity] debuff from the target and placing them on all other enemies. Lv. 2 Damage +20% Lv. 3 Buff/Debuff Chance +10% Lv. 4 Buff/Debuff Chance +15% Lv. 5 Cooldown -1
